name: Ma Long

timeline.subtitle: Selected for National Team

achievements: 馃 Rio Olympics Men's Singles Gold (beat Zhang Jike 4:0 in final)

achievements: 馃弳 D眉sseldorf World Championships Men's Singles Champion (successful defense)

achievements.title: 猸?Double Grand Slam
achievements.description: Ma Long is the first male player in history to win singles titles at the Olympics, World Championships, World Cup, Asian Games, Asian Championships, Asia Cup, World Tour Finals, National Games, and National Championships, with at least two titles at each major 鈥?the Double Grand Slam.
